name: trigger_deploy
description: Trigger a new build and deploy for a Netlify site. This creates a new build from the linked Git repository's current state. Useful after changing environment variables, updating content, or when you need to force a fresh deploy without a new commit.

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: The site ID (UUID) to trigger a deploy for.

parameters.name: clear_cache
parameters.description: If true, clears the build cache before building. Useful for resolving stale cache issues.
